data.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Decision engine gate evaluation complete. Gate 1 (No-Op): FAIL — behavioral changes to sprint orchestrator affect agent-facing rules. Gate 2 (User Impact): FAIL — no end-user UI/workflow changes. Gate 3 (Architectural): PASS — new sprint self-healing checkpoints, two new scripts, two new contracts constitute architectural additions. Gate 4 (Constraint): PASS — new script names and contract paths are constraints agents must reference. Actions: (1) CLAUDE.md suggested-change report for new sprint gap detection content; (2) Living Reference update for system-landscape.md; (3) ADR creation for sprint gap detection architecture.
